description: The extends preset is pinned to a commit SHA, matching the SHA-pinning discipline .claude/rules/github-actions-security.md imposes on actions: the thing that keeps our action SHAs current is itself pinned, so an edit upstream cannot silently change update policy here. Bump the SHA deliberately.
enabledManagers and automerge are declared here, not inherited, so the external preset cannot silently drop manifest coverage or turn automerge on.
